examples.title: E-Waste Recycling Priority Calculator
examples.description: Algorithm to determine priority level for e-waste recycling based on toxicity and material value
examples.code:
INPUT: Type of e-waste component
CALCULATE: Toxicity score and material value score
OUTPUT: Recycling priority ranking
examples.explanation: Demonstrate how different e-waste components are prioritized for recycling based on toxicity and economic value

examples.title: Heavy Metal Exposure Risk Assessment
examples.description: Algorithm to assess health risk level based on exposure route and duration
examples.code:
INPUT: Exposure type (inhalation/ingestion/dermal), duration, concentration
CALCULATE: Dose received using toxicity parameters
OUTPUT: Risk level (low/medium/high)
examples.explanation: Model how health professionals assess exposure risks from e-waste pollutants
